message:
feat: add E keybinding to export Markdown report from TUI

- Press E anywhere in the TUI to export all issues to Markdown
- Auto-generates filename: beads_report_<project>_YYYY-MM-DD.md
- Shows success/error feedback in status bar
- Added to help overlay under General section

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
